## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory call between Marcel Santilli (GrowthX Labs) and Andy Price (Artisanal Ventures) to explore potential collaboration opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/xv_bUCdzCLSsHVfsUe2JRzkCsngSaocX?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcel's company (fwd.digital) offers AI-powered content generation services, achieving $3M ARR in 6 months with 25 clients](https://fathom.video/share/xv_bUCdzCLSsHVfsUe2JRzkCsngSaocX?tab=summary&timestamp=669.0)
  - [Not a venture target for Artisanal due to category mismatch, but potential for referral partnership](https://fathom.video/share/xv_bUCdzCLSsHVfsUe2JRzkCsngSaocX?tab=summary&timestamp=905.0)
  - [Andy requests more info (deck/Loom) to better understand fwd.digital's offerings for portfolio companies](https://fathom.video/share/xv_bUCdzCLSsHVfsUe2JRzkCsngSaocX?tab=summary&timestamp=986.0)

## Topics

### Marcel's Background and Experience

  - [Brazilian-born, Texas-raised; early career at IBM and HP](https://fathom.video/share/xv_bUCdzCLSsHVfsUe2JRzkCsngSaocX?tab=summary&timestamp=80.0)
  - [Created successful content hubs: secretintelligence.com (IBM) and techbeaking.com (HP)](https://fathom.video/share/xv_bUCdzCLSsHVfsUe2JRzkCsngSaocX?tab=summary&timestamp=116.0)
  - [CMO roles at HashiCorp and Scale AI, known for surviving Alex Wang's leadership](https://fathom.video/share/xv_bUCdzCLSsHVfsUe2JRzkCsngSaocX?tab=summary&timestamp=189.0)
  - [Organized successful virtual conferences (Transform, Transcend) at Scale AI](https://fathom.video/share/xv_bUCdzCLSsHVfsUe2JRzkCsngSaocX?tab=summary&timestamp=285.0)

### fwd.digital Overview

  - [Founded \~6 months ago, currently at $3M ARR with 25 logos](https://fathom.video/share/xv_bUCdzCLSsHVfsUe2JRzkCsngSaocX?tab=summary&timestamp=456.0)
  - [15 employees, including ex-Canopy CTO as co-founder](https://fathom.video/share/xv_bUCdzCLSsHVfsUe2JRzkCsngSaocX?tab=summary&timestamp=471.0)
  - [Clients range from seed-stage to public companies (e.g., Reddit, RAMP)](https://fathom.video/share/xv_bUCdzCLSsHVfsUe2JRzkCsngSaocX?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Offers AI-powered content generation services with human expertise](https://fathom.video/share/xv_bUCdzCLSsHVfsUe2JRzkCsngSaocX?tab=summary&timestamp=607.0)
  - [Publishing 20 million words/month for clients](https://fathom.video/share/xv_bUCdzCLSsHVfsUe2JRzkCsngSaocX?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)

### Business Model and Differentiation

  - ["Services as software" approach, not pure SaaS or traditional agency](https://fathom.video/share/xv_bUCdzCLSsHVfsUe2JRzkCsngSaocX?tab=summary&timestamp=662.0)
  - [12-month commitments, focus on content and programmatic SEO](https://fathom.video/share/xv_bUCdzCLSsHVfsUe2JRzkCsngSaocX?tab=summary&timestamp=553.0)
  - [AI-powered workflows (200+ steps) with human experts in the loop](https://fathom.video/share/xv_bUCdzCLSsHVfsUe2JRzkCsngSaocX?tab=summary&timestamp=579.0)
  - [Delivering both strategy and execution at tool-only prices](https://fathom.video/share/xv_bUCdzCLSsHVfsUe2JRzkCsngSaocX?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Example: Closed $39k/month deal, significantly higher than tool-only pricing](https://fathom.video/share/xv_bUCdzCLSsHVfsUe2JRzkCsngSaocX?tab=summary&timestamp=669.0)

### Market Opportunity and Positioning

  - [Content marketing industry: $530B/year, mostly services](https://fathom.video/share/xv_bUCdzCLSsHVfsUe2JRzkCsngSaocX?tab=summary&timestamp=735.0)
  - [Targeting the gap between expensive agencies and limited AI tools](https://fathom.video/share/xv_bUCdzCLSsHVfsUe2JRzkCsngSaocX?tab=summary&timestamp=707.0)
  - [Potential new category of service-like companies with tech-enabled efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/xv_bUCdzCLSsHVfsUe2JRzkCsngSaocX?tab=summary&timestamp=942.0)

### Artisanal Ventures' Perspective

  - [Not a venture target due to focus on deep IP and tech companies](https://fathom.video/share/xv_bUCdzCLSsHVfsUe2JRzkCsngSaocX?tab=summary&timestamp=846.0)
  - [Andy expresses interest in referral partnership](https://fathom.video/share/xv_bUCdzCLSsHVfsUe2JRzkCsngSaocX?tab=summary&timestamp=1036.0)
  - [Highlights the importance of storytelling for tech startups](https://fathom.video/share/xv_bUCdzCLSsHVfsUe2JRzkCsngSaocX?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to send a Loom video and/or deck explaining fwd.digital's offerings](https://fathom.video/share/xv_bUCdzCLSsHVfsUe2JRzkCsngSaocX?tab=summary&timestamp=1056.0)
  - [Explore potential referrals to Artisanal's portfolio companies](https://fathom.video/share/xv_bUCdzCLSsHVfsUe2JRzkCsngSaocX?tab=summary&timestamp=1036.0)
  - [Consider future discussions if alignment with Artisanal's investment focus emerges](https://fathom.video/share/xv_bUCdzCLSsHVfsUe2JRzkCsngSaocX?tab=summary&timestamp=1065.0)
